summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse video: a montage of Trump's visit to China's Temple of Heaven, set to music with no speech (transcript: 'Music'). It shows low-angle shots of the architecture, a backlit shot through a doorway of Trump, Xi and Melania, a slow-motion close-up of feet crossing the courtyard, painted ceilings, and a slow-motion wide shot with white lower-third name text.

script.scene: Low-angle shot of the blue and gold tiered roof of the Temple of Heaven against an overcast sky, color graded cool. Music only.
Backlit shot framed through a dark temple doorway: Trump, Xi Jinping and Melania (with aides) walk toward the camera out of the bright courtyard beyond.
Slow-motion ground-level close-up of the delegation's feet and legs walking across the worn stone courtyard, sunlight on polished shoes.
Tilting interior shot looking up at the painted, gilded temple ceiling beams and red columns.
Slow-motion wide shot of Trump, Melania, Xi and Eric Trump walking abreast across the plaza flanked by security, with white lower-third text reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD ... TRUMP.'

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP (on-screen lower third); tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): 'President Donald J. Trump Visits China's Temple of Heaven.'
